sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Test upper blue block (rows 16-19, cols 0-3)
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 17, 'col': 1}])
print("Action result:", last_action_result)

# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame
before_ascii = before.ascii.split('\n')
after_ascii = after.ascii.split('\n')

# Check green bar position
print("\nGreen bar area before (rows 52-57, cols 5-15):")
for i in range(52, 58):
    print(f"  {i}: {before_ascii[i][5:15]}")

print("\nGreen bar area after (rows 52-57, cols 5-15):")
for i in range(52, 58):
    print(f"  {i}: {after_ascii[i][5:15]}")

# Check if it shifted right or left
# Look for N (green) positions
before_green_cols = []
after_green_cols = []
for i in range(52, 58):
    for j, c in enumerate(before_ascii[i]):
        if c == 'N':
            before_green_cols.append(j)
    for j, c in enumerate(after_ascii[i]):
        if c == 'N':
            after_green_cols.append(j)

print(f"\nGreen bar cols before: {sorted(set(before_green_cols))}")
print(f"Green bar cols after: {sorted(set(after_green_cols))}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
